title: agrostis trachyphylla
intro: Agrostis trachyphylla, also known as blue bent grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the genus Agrostis in the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Agrostis trachyphylla include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
